sentences.arabic: مِنَ الْمُهِمِّ إِيجَادُ تَوَازُنٍ بَيْنَ الْعَمَلِ وَالْحَيَاةِ الشَّخْصِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Važno je pronaći ravnotežu između posla i privatnog života.
sentences.translationEn: It is important to find a balance between work and personal life.

sentences.arabic: لَا أَتَفَقَّدُ بَرِيدِيَ الْإِلِكْتْرُونِيَّ الْخَاصَّ بِالْعَمَلِ خِلَالَ عُطْلَةِ نِهَايَةِ الْأُسْبُوعِ.
sentences.translation: Ne provjeravam svoju poslovnu e-poštu tokom vikenda.
sentences.translationEn: I do not check my work emails during the weekend.

sentences.arabic: قَضَاءُ الْوَقْتِ مَعَ الْعَائِلَةِ يُسَاعِدُ فِي تَقْلِيلِ التَّوَتُّرِ الْمِهْنِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Provođenje vremena s porodicom pomaže u smanjenju profesionalnog stresa.
sentences.translationEn: Spending time with family helps reduce professional stress.
